hero.title:
Your Refuge
in the Heart of Palermo

welcome.label: SINCE 2021 · PALERMO CENTRE
welcome.title: Welcome to Alma Hotel
welcome.text: In the heart of Palermo, steps away from the city's most beautiful monuments, Alma Hotel welcomes you in an atmosphere of discreet elegance and authentic warmth.
welcome.text2: Three refined room categories, breakfast included every morning, and a dedicated team ready to fulfil your every need. Because a trip to Palermo deserves to be experienced at its best.

rooms.heading:
Spaces Designed

matrimoniale.name: Double Room

suite.description: The ultimate boutique luxury: generous spaces, privileged views, exclusive services.

services.label: OUR SERVICES
services.heading: Everything Included in Your Stay
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need for a perfect stay

restaurant.label: THE RESTAURANT
restaurant.title: Sapori Perduti
restaurant.text: Steps away from the hotel, restaurant Sapori Perduti brings the best of Sicilian tradition to the table, masterfully reinterpreted by Chef Piero Oneto. An authentic culinary experience in the heart of Palermo.

experience.label: PALERMO TO EXPLORE
experience.title: The City at Your Doorstep
experience.text: Alma Hotel is situated in the beating heart of Palermo, just minutes on foot from historic markets, the Cathedral and Teatro Massimo. The most beautiful city in the Mediterranean is all around you.

highlight.label: EVERY MORNING
highlight.title: Breakfast Included
highlight.text: Start the day with a generous breakfast, prepared with fresh local produce.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A story of hospitality in the heart of Palermo
about.historyText: Alma Hotel was born in the historic centre of Palermo with a clear objective: to offer guests an authentic, refined, and welcoming stay experience. For years Antonella & Paolo have passionately managed this boutique hotel, conveying the values of Sicilian hospitality.
about.historyText2: Each room was designed with care to combine modern comfort with classic Sicilian elegance. Our staff, present 24 hours a day, is always available to make your stay unforgettable.
about.missionText1: Every detail of your stay is carefully attended to. From arrival to departure, our team is always on hand to ensure impeccable service.
about.missionText2: We are proud to be a reference point for travellers visiting Palermo, offering not just a place to sleep, but an authentic experience of Sicilian life.
about.reviewsTitle: The Voice of Those Who Chose Us

suite.name: Suite
suite.longDescription: The Suite is our most exclusive accommodation, designed for those who refuse to compromise. Spacious settings, exquisite furnishings, fine finishes and a breathtaking view over the city of Palermo. An extraordinary stay experience at the heart of Sicily.
suite.specs: 38 m² · King Size Bed · 3rd Floor · Panoramic View
suite.metaDescription: Our exclusive Suite in the heart of Palermo. Generous spaces, refined furnishings, city views. The ultimate comfort for an unforgettable stay.

matrimoniale.name: Double Room
matrimoniale.tagline: Elegance in the Heart of Palermo
matrimoniale.longDescription: Our Double Room is a haven of elegance and comfort in the heart of Palermo. Furnished with care and attention to detail, it offers everything needed for an unforgettable stay. Natural light, warm and peaceful atmosphere — your home away from home.
matrimoniale.specs: 22 m² · King Size Bed · Private Bathroom · City View
matrimoniale.metaDescription: Elegant double room in the heart of Palermo. King-size bed, private bathroom, air conditioning, breakfast included.

matrimonialeSuperiore.name: Superior Double Room
matrimonialeSuperiore.longDescription: The Superior Double Room combines generous space with premium finishes for a truly quality stay. Larger than the standard, with carefully selected furnishings and premium details, it is the ideal choice for those seeking maximum comfort without giving up the authenticity of Palermo.
matrimonialeSuperiore.specs: 28 m² · King Size Bed · 2nd Floor · Privileged View
matrimonialeSuperiore.metaTitle: Superior Double Room – Alma Hotel Palermo
matrimonialeSuperiore.metaDescription: Superior double room in the heart of Palermo. More spacious, premium finishes, privileged view. Breakfast included.
